creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello Miroslav,

the regular wine ports and wine-proton (emulators/wine, emulators/wine-devel) do have now i386 support.

That means you can use now 32-bit and 64-bit ports at the same time.

Thus, this port have gotten unnecessary and requested for removal.

See: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D32322
